2605.06298.title: Render, Don't Decode: Weight-Space World Models with Latent Structural Disentanglement
2605.06298.paper_summary: Training world models on vast quantities of unlabelled videos is a critical step toward fully autonomous intelligence. However, the prevailing paradigm of encoding raw pixels into opaque latent spaces and relying on heavy decoders for reconstruction leaves these models computationally expensive and uninterpretable. We address this problem by introducing NOVA, a world modelling framework that represents the system state as the weights and biases of an auxiliary coordinate-based implicit neural representation (INR). This structured representation is analytically rendered, which eliminates the decoder bottleneck while conferring compactness, portability, and zero-shot super-resolution. Furthermore, like most latent action models, NOVA can be distilled into a context-dependent video generator via an action-matching objective. Surprisingly, without resorting to auxiliary losses or adversarial objectives, NOVA can disentangle structural scene components such as background, foreground, and inter-frame motion, enabling users to edit either content or dynamics without compromising the other. We validate our framework on several challenging datasets, achieving strong controllable forecasting while operating on a single consumer GPU at $\sim$40M parameters. Ultimately, structured representations like INRs not only enhance our understanding of latent dynamics but also pave the way for immersive and customisable virtual experiences.
2605.06298.paper_summary_zh: 訓練世界模型於大量未標記的視頻上是邁向完全自主智慧的重要一步。<lb/>然而，將原始像素編碼為不透明潛在空間並依賴重型解碼器進行重建的主流範式，使得這些模型在計算上昂貴且難以解釋。<lb/>我們通過引入NOVA來解決這一問題，這是一個世界建模框架，將系統狀態表示為輔助坐標基隱式神經表示（INR）的權重和偏差。<lb/>這種結構化表示是以解析方式呈現的，消除了解碼器瓶頸，同時賦予了緊湊性、可攜性和零樣本超分辨率。<lb/>此外，像大多數潛在行動模型一樣，NOVA可以通過行動匹配目標提煉為上下文依賴的視頻生成器。<lb/>令人驚訝的是，NOVA在不依賴輔助損失或對抗目標的情況下，能夠解開結構場景組件，如背景、前景和幀間運動，使得用戶可以在不妥協其他方面的情況下編輯內容或動態。<lb/>我們在幾個具有挑戰性的數據集上驗證了我們的框架，實現了強大的可控預測，同時在單個消費者GPU上運行，參數約為$\sim$40M。<lb/>最終，像INR這樣的結構化表示不僅增強了我們對潛在動態的理解，還為沉浸式和可定制的虛擬體驗鋪平了道路。
2605.06298.author: Roussel Desmond Nzoyem et.al.
